patches.hypothesis: The overfitting patch was created to pass the testing logs and fix the software in a quick and easy way. However, this method uses hard-coded values, specific test inputs, and lacks edge case coverage. To refine the method, we should replace the hard-coded values with variables, include more robust logic, add missing edge cases, and ensure proper null checks and boundaries.
The method was not handling the case where the input sequence is empty or contains only a single character, which caused the loop to access an out of bounds index.
patches.changes: + Handle empty or single character input sequence.
patches.diff: + Handle empty or single character input sequence.
